qwen3-8b.notes: Solid generalist on this bench. 88% overall, 100% format compliance, no standout strength.

qwen2.5-coder-7b.notes: Code-specialist but holds up at classification (86%). Hard-task drop is real (66%). Slower than peers.

gemma4-e4b.notes: Only multimodal model in the registry (vision + audio). 89% on this text bench. mlx-lm 0.31.3 incompatible (issue #1242) — use mlx-vlm backend.

gemma3-12b-qat.notes: Highest accuracy on this bench (93%). Slowest non-reasoning model (1.4s/ex). Tight on 16GB — close apps before running.

gemma3-4b-qat.notes: Good quality/size tradeoff (85%, 2.6GB). Was top non-12B pick before JSON default; Llama 3.2 3B now leads at smaller size.

phi4-mini-reasoning.notes: Bad fit for classification (52%, 27% format_ok). Reasoning-tuned model emits CoT instead of labels. 12x slower than non-reasoning peers.

smollm3-3b.notes: Weak overall (77%) but big improvement when forced to JSON format (+11 vs text). Format compliance 97%.

deepseek-r1-distill-7b.notes: Bad fit for classification (64%, 38% format_ok). Reasoning distill emits <think> blocks; 23x slower than peers.

llama-3.2-3b.notes: Surprise top pick on this bench (91%, 0.42s, 1.8GB). Pareto-dominates everything except gemma3-12b-qat — and CIs overlap, so the gap may be noise.

ministral-3-8b.notes: Dec 2025 Mistral-3, Apache 2.0. 90% accuracy but 3.55s/example — 8x slower than Llama 3.2 3B for 1 point of accuracy. Pareto-dominated.

phi4-mini-instruct.notes: Non-reasoning Phi-4-mini. 87%, 100% fmt_ok, 0.53s/ex — clean +35pt improvement over the reasoning variant (52%, 27% fmt_ok). Use this, not Phi-4-mini-reasoning.

nemotron-nano-9b.notes: NVIDIA Mamba-2/Transformer hybrid. 88%, but 9.82s/ex and 95% fmt_ok (slightly leaky /think). Not Pareto-competitive against Llama 3.2 3B.

hermes-3-llama-3.2-3b.notes: NousResearch finetune of Llama 3.2 3B. Striking failure: fmt_ok drops to 28% (base is 100%), accuracy drops 11pt to 80%. RLHF finetune unlearned structured-output following. Cautionary.

mistral-nemo-minitron-8b.notes: NVIDIA's Mistral distillation. 89% accuracy but 12.18s/example — extremely verbose output before EOS. Strongly Pareto-dominated.

llama-3.1-8b.notes: Older Llama baseline. 89% vs Llama 3.2 3B's 91% — newer & smaller wins on accuracy AND speed (0.93s vs 0.42s). Bigger is not better here.

apple-foundation.notes: Apple on-device ~3B FM via afm (brew install scouzi1966/afm/afm). Requires macOS 26.2+, Xcode 26.5+, Apple Intelligence enabled, and `afm` server running.
